"-" = Unknown.
233 G4BB G4BB_ARM_MOVE (G4BB) Arm Voluntary Movement CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - arm - including shoulder or elbow - voluntary movement. 0 = No Loss, 1 = Partial Loss, 2 = Full Loss, "-" = Unknown.
234 G4CA G4CA_HAND_RANGE (G4CA) Hand Range of Motion CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - hand - including wrist or fingers -
